name: urlmcp
description: Self-contained MCP server that turns any website into a runnable MCP server, in-process. Host-as-brain by default (no API key); optional OpenAI/Anthropic/Gemini/Groq/Ollama/... or a custom inference URL.
author: Franck Fongang

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && npm run build --workspace=@mcp/generator && tsc -p tsconfig.json
scripts.test: npm run build && node test/providers.mjs && node test/scraper-select.mjs && node test/stealth-ladder.mjs && node test/robots-gate.mjs && node test/browser-connect.mjs && node test/extension-bridge.mjs && node test/credential-safety.mjs && node test/crawl-scraper.mjs && node test/persistence.mjs && node test/smoke.mjs && node test/emit.mjs && node test/local-e2e.mjs && node test/dynamic-backcompat.mjs && node test/dynamic-live.mjs && node test/auth-handoff-live.mjs && node test/cdp-attach-live.mjs && node test/security.mjs
scripts.test:live-browser: npm run build && FORGE_TEST_LIVE_BROWSER=1 node test/dynamic-live.mjs && FORGE_TEST_LIVE_BROWSER=1 node test/auth-handoff-live.mjs && FORGE_TEST_LIVE_BROWSER=1 node test/cdp-attach-live.mjs
